name: [Take&Go] Meta Ads Insghts Daily - Sheets | Postgres

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value: =ad_id, ad_name, campaign_name, adset_name, impressions, reach, frequency, clicks, spend, ctr, cpm, cpc, actions, cost_per_action_type, cost_per_conversion, video_p50_watched_actions, cost_per_lead, outbound_clicks, adset_id, campaign_id, created_time, account_id

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value:
=account_id,
created_time,
adset_id,
campaign_id,
account_name,
ad_id,
ad_name,
adset_name,
campaign_name,
objective,
impressions,
clicks,
spend,
cpc,
cpm,
reach,
frequency,
ctr,
cost_per_lead,
actions,
action_values,
cost_per_action_type,
cost_per_conversion,
video_p50_watched_actions

assignments.name: Custo por Lead
assignments.value: ={{ parseFloat(   $json["cost_per_action_type"]     ?.filter(a =>       a.action_type === "lead" ||       a.action_type === "leadgen.other" ||       a.action_type === "onsite_lead" ||       a.action_type === "leadgen" ||       a.action_type === "complete_registration" ||       a.action_type === "sign_up"     )[0]?.value || 0 ) }}

assignments.name: Pageview
Pageview
Custo por Lead
assignments.value: ={{ parseFloat(   $json["cost_per_action_type"]     ?.filter(a =>       a.action_type === "lead" ||       a.action_type === "leadgen.other" ||       a.action_type === "onsite_lead" ||       a.action_type === "leadgen" ||       a.action_type === "complete_registration" ||       a.action_type === "sign_up"     )[0]?.value || 0 ) }}

assignments.name: Objetivo
assignments.value:
={{ $json["objective"] === "OUTCOME_LEADS" ? "Geração de Leads" : 
   $json["objective"] === "OUTCOME_SALES" ? "Vendas" : 
   $json["objective"] === "OUTCOME_ENGAGEMENT" ? "Engajamento" : 
   $json["objective"] === "LINK_CLICKS" ? "Cliques no Link" : 
   $json["objective"] === "AWARENESS" ? "Reconhecimento de Marca" : 
   $json["objective"] === "TRAFFIC" ? "Tráfego" : 
   $json["objective"] }}

assignments.name: PAGEVIEW

parameters.query: SELECT account_id FROM config_meta_accounts WHERE is_active = true;
SELECT account_id FROM config_meta_accounts WHERE is_active = true;
